channel.title: 📰 AI新闻 on AI热榜 - 每天 08:30 更新 | AI工具大全·AI导航·AI工具推荐
channel.description: Recent content in 📰 AI新闻 on AI热榜 - 每天 08:30 更新 | AI工具大全·AI导航·AI工具推荐

item.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
item.description:
来自 OpenAI News：OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S.

governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.

item.title: Anthropic releases its first Mythos-class model Claude Fable
item.description:
来自 The Verge AI：Anthropic just announced Claude Fable 5, a new AI model it said is the most powerful model it has ever made widely available.

According to the company, Fable 5 “shows exceptional performance in software engineering, kno…

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
item.description:
来自 TechCrunch AI：Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public.

The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

🔗 原始来源

item.title: Apple bets cheaper AI will woo small developers
item.description:
来自 TechCrunch AI：As AI experimentation grows more expensive, Apple is waiving cloud API costs for developers with fewer than 2 million first-time App Store downloads.

item.title: Apple is embracing the fantasy of AI photo editing
item.description:
来自 The Verge AI：Apple used to question whether generative AI-powered editing features were worth the risk of distorting our perceptions of the world.

Now it seems Apple no longer believes that photos should accurately capture reality.…

item.title: Apple’s AI pitch will live or die by its privacy promise
item.description:
来自 The Verge AI：As expected, yesterday’s WWDC keynote was mostly about AI.

And also as expected, Apple tried to turn its late arrival into its sales pitch: It didn’t rush into AI because it was taking its time to do things right.

In th…

item.title: Apple’s best AI idea looks a lot like vibe coding
item.description:
来自 The Verge AI：Most of Apple’s current AI ideas are roughly the same as everyone else’s AI ideas.

A chatbot you can ask questions; quick ways to create or summarize text; bizarre, borderline creepy image-generation tools.

The company…

item.title: Apple’s WWDC AI demos looked more real after $250M false ad settlement
item.description:
来自 TechCrunch AI：The vibe of Apple’s 2026 WWDC keynote felt like a spouse proudly listing all the honey-do-list items tackled.

One subtle example: the many AI demos of someone standing, phone in hand.

🔗 原始来源

item.title: Are AI chatbots making us lose control of our brains?
item.description:
来自 MIT Tech Review：This week I’ve been at SXSW London.

There’s been music, film, and a lot—and I mean a lot—of talk about AI.

I also had the opportunity to sit down with Gloria Mark, a psychologist at the University of California, Irvine,…
